titleStmt.title: SII 18.85: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 85. (B.K. No. 64 of 1933-34.) DAṆḌĀPUR, NARGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying near the Jummā Masjid.

summary.p: This damaged inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the cyclic year Kālayukti in the reign of king Chālukya Vikrama, Pushya, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa. During the reign of Vikramāditya VI, the cyclic year Kāḷayukta coincided with A.D. 1078 and the Uttarāyaṇa samkraṁaṇa fell on December 24, Tuesday.

It registers a grant of land made by pergaḍe Mamma (of Narugunda) for a feeding house when Vīra-Noḷamba Pallava-Permāḍi Jayasimhadēva, the king's younger brother, was governing the Two Six-hundreds and Banavāsi Twelve-thousand. The gift was obtained by Mamma from the Fifty-five Mahājanas of Paḍuvāgēri in Naṟugunda. It also states that the feeding house was continued by Mamma's younger brother Dēvaṇṇa. A supplementary grant of ornaments, utensils, etc., made by Mamma to the Sun-god of Mūlasthāna is also recorded. The name of the composer of the record is given as ūroḍeya Nāgadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmadbhuvanajanastutaśaraṇāgatāvanīpāḷalasanmastanyasta cāḷukyavikramādityanṛpaḥ . Ēka
yiyenikuṁ bhittiyaṁ catussamudraṁbaramavyāku permmāḍin®paṁ . v® .
rvvīcakradoḷva suva magadhanēpāḷacōḷāṁdhravaṁgāṁgakaḷiṁgā dikṣitīśa ṟaguvudī cōdyaṁ sāhasa
radvīpabhūparttiṟuva ddhasarvvasvamaṁ lō kṣigaḷoḷadaṭa kramādityadē
samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja ramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśaya
kaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō ttarābhivṛdhdhipravarddhamānamā
tāraṁ saluttavire . kanḍa . tadanuja mahitamahī lakṣmīsadanaṁ parāṁ
siṁhadēva vīranoḷaṁbaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamūna lōka vikhyāta pallavānvaya śrīmahīvallabha yuvarā
paramēśvaraṁ vīramahēśvaraṁ vikramābharaṇaṁ jayalakṣmīramaṇaṁ maṇi cāḷukyacūḍāmaṇi ka
traṁ kṣatriyapavitraṁ mattagajāṁgarājaṁ sahajamanōjaṁ ripurāyakaṭaka sūṟekāṟanaṇnanaṁkakāṟa śrīmatrai
malla vīranoḷaṁbapallavapermmāḍi jayasiṁhadēvareraḍaṟunūṟumaṁ gaḷmaṁ banavāsi pannicchāsira
khasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷuttamire . vva . kuṁtaḷadēśadoḷnegaḻda dentu nōḷvaḍaṁ santatamoḷpuvetta
mage bhattagāvegellaṁ taleyeṁdu sarvvadhanadhānyasamṛddhi rggundamahāgrahāra
Ā naṟugundadoḷpaḍuvagēriya viprasamūha pannarssakaḷaśśrutiśā stravēdigaḷdānavi
nōdigaḷmanucaritraranaṁgasamānagātrarurvvīnutardharmma kāmadhēnugaḷ . Ā vipra
kaṁda . negaḻdaṁ sale viśvāmitragōtradoḷsāyimayyaṁ vikhyāta ḷinanādanavargge mūbala
sadiṁ Ā mūbalavibhugaṁ tadbhāminigā cāṁkaṇabṭegaṁ puṭṭida malligāṁkanastakaḷaṁka
paḍedarnnijārtthamaṁ suragurudvijapūjege goṭṭu satyamaṁ viśiṣṭasākṣarajana ne yōginītiyoḷnaḍedu śata
nibhakīrtti virājitanādanintu saṁgaḍade dharitri baṇṇipudu mammana nātmadharmmana . kanda . kṣōṇījanamannamayaprā
ṇaṁ tāneṁbarannamaṁ koṭṭātaṁ prāṇamane paḍedanadaṟiṁ jāṇaṁ mēlannadāna ṟinda . [E]ndiṁtu niścayaṁ geydeṁdigaṁ
tanna māḍidannada dānaṁ kundade naḍevantire sānandaṁ piridā caḷukyavikramana
tikāḷaṁ kāḷayukta saṁvatsaramāge puṣyamāsōttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa mahōttamatithiyoḷ dharmma
pūrvvakamakhiḷa mahājanamayvattayvarīye sarvvanamasyāvaniyaṁ panneraḍu nivarttanamaṁ śatrakke paḍedu perggaḍe ma
mma . nelakellaṁ mēlenipudu sale candrādityavarttiyāpattiyoḷuppilavaḷḷadinda paḍuvaṇa taḷadoḷagutkṛṣṭamappa
keyyaṁ biṭṭa . Oḍavuṭṭida piriyaṇnana naḍayipa śatrakke tanna dhanamana rbbē®paḍisadanu sarisi naḍayisu
deyoḷdēvaṇnaṁ kṛtārtthanō jagadoḷ . teṟebhāgavaḷateyasateṁbaṟikeya teṟegaḷoḷa mēnumaṁ śatra
da keytiṟadantire naḍayisuvarṇnaṟuguṁdada paḍuvagēriyayvattayvar . v® . priyadindaṁ naṟugundadoḷnegaḷda mū
lastānadarkkaṁge beḷḷiya kaṇtāṁbrada bhājanaṁ toḷapa paṭṭaṁ boṭṭu ghaṁṭācatuṣṭa yameṁdintivanittanuttamacaritraṁ vandi
janāśrayanurvvījana(ṁ)markaṟiṁ pogaḷvinaṁ mamma yaśōmaṇḍana . kanda . parakṛta nijakṛta dharmmōrvvare yaṁdanale
ḷipiniṁdaḷidā kāpuruṣanaṟuvattusāsira variṣaṁ pēloḷage puṭṭi puḷuvāgikkuṁ . ślōka . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasē
turnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhissarvvānētānbhāginaṟprārtthivēṁ drānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāma
caṁdraḥ . kaṁda . paramaguṇagaṇake niḷayaṁ pariṇatanūroḍeya nāgadēvaṁ pēḻdaṁ dhare baṇnisalartthiyinā
daradiṁdelasiyara kēsimayyaṁ baredaṁ . © maṁgaḷa © © © cuṁcina kētōjana kaṇḍaraṇe © © ©
Digital edition of SII 18.85 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
